Hi {{first_name}},

Most contractor-developer relationships have a reporting layer that doesn't connect to either party's live
systems. ARQY removes it. Milestone completions update the developer's financial record in real time,
with full traceability.

Your clients get the visibility they want. Your team stops manually bridging the gap. The relationship
gets cleaner.

Worth 20 minutes to walk through the mechanics?

Thanks in advance,

{seller_name}}
